import numpy as np
price = np.array([250,400,320,150,500])
cost = np.array([180,290,250,90,370])
qty = np.array([120,85,150,210,70])
revenue = price * qty
profit = revenue - cost
total_profit = np.sum(profit)
count = np.sum(profit >= 10000)

import numpy as np
sales = np.array([[600,700,650,800],[500,550,600,620],[720,710,690,730],[400,450,500,520]])
avg_region = sales.mean(axis=1)
total_quarter = sales.sum(axis=0)
above_target = total_quarter[total_quarter > 650]
growth = (sales[:,3] - sales[:,0]) / sales[:,0] * 100

import numpy as np
price = np.array([250,400,320,150,500])
cost = np.array([180,290,250,90,370])
qty = np.array([120,85,150,210,70])
revenue = np.multiply(price, qty)
profit = np.subtract(revenue, cost)
total_profit = profit.sum()
count = (profit >= 10000).sum()

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({
 'MaDonHang':[1,2,3],
 'TenSanPham':['Laptop','Chuot','Man hinh'],
 'SoLuong':[2,5,1],
 'DanhGia':[5,4,5]
})
price_map = {'Laptop':18000,'Ban phim':500,'Chuot':350,'Man hinh':4500}
df['DonGia'] = df['TenSanPham'].map(price_map)
df['ThanhTien'] = df['SoLuong'] * df['DonGia']
df = df.sort_values(by='ThanhTien', ascending=False)

import numpy as np
price = np.array([250,400,320,150,500])
cost = np.array([180,290,250,90,370])
qty = np.array([120,85,150,210,70])
profit = price*qty - cost
total_profit = profit.sum()
count = np.count_nonzero(profit >= 10000)

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({
 'Ten':['A','B','C'],
 'PhongBan':['Kinh doanh','IT','Kinh doanh'],
 'NamKinhNghiem':[5,2,4],
 'LuongThang':[25000000,15000000,30000000]
})
count_exp = (df['NamKinhNghiem'] > 3).sum()
df['ThuNhapNam'] = df['LuongThang'] * 12
count_sales = df[(df['PhongBan']=='Kinh doanh') & (df['ThuNhapNam'] > 250000000)].shape[0]

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({
 'MaDonHang':[1,2,3],
 'TenSanPham':['Laptop','Chuột','Màn hình'],
 'Soluong':[2,5,1],
 'DanhGia':[5,4,5]
})
price_map = {'Laptop':18000,'Bàn phím':500,'Chuột':350,'Màn hình':4500}
df['DonGia'] = df['TenSanPham'].map(price_map)
df['ThanhTien'] = df['Soluong'] * df['DonGia']
df = df.sort_value(by='ThanhTien', ascending=False)

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({
 'Ten':['A','B','C'],
 'PhongBan':['Kinh doanh','IT','Kinh doanh'],
 'NamKinhNghiem':[5,2,4],
 'LuongThang':[25000000,15000000,30000000]
})
count_exp = len(df[df.NamKinhNghiem > 3])
count_sales = len(df[(df.PhongBan=='KinhDoanh') & (df.LuongThang*12 > 250000000)])

import numpy as np
price = np.array([250,400,320,150,500])
cost = np.array([180,290,250,90,370])
qty = np.array([120,85,150,210,70])
revenue = price * qty
profit = revenue - cost
total_profit = np.sum(profit)
count = np.sum(profit >= 10_000)

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({
 'Ten':['A','B','C'],
 'PhongBan':['Kinh doanh','IT','Kinh doanh'],
 'NamKinhNghiem':[5,2,4],
 'LuongThang':[25000000,15000000,30000000]
})
count_exp = df.query('NamKinhNghiem > 3').shape[0]
count_sales = df.query("PhongBan == 'Kinh doanh' and LuongThang*12 > 250000000").shape[0]

import numpy as np
sales = np.array([[600,700,650,800],[500,550,600,620],[720,710,690,730],[400,450,500,520]])
avg_region = np.mean(sales, axis=1)
total_quarter = np.sum(sales, axis=0)
above_target = np.where(total_quarter > 650)
growth = (sales[:,3]/sales[:,0] - 1)*100

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({
 'MaDonHang':[1,2,3],
 'TenSanPham':['Laptop','Chuột','Màn hình'],
 'SoLuong':[2,5,1],
 'DanhGia':[5,4,5]
})
price_map = {'Laptop':18000,'Bàn phím':500,'Chuột':350,'Màn hình':4500}
df = df.assign(DonGia=df['TenSanPham'].map(price_map))
df = df.assign(ThanhTien=df['SoLuong']*df['DonGia'])
df = df.sort_values('ThanhTien', ascending=False)

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({

})
